campaignHub.notFoundBlurb: This campaign doesn’t exist, or you’re not a member of it.
campaignHub.attachAlreadyElsewhere: That character is already in “{{campaign}}”. Detach it there first.
campaignHub.attachRaceLost: That character was just attached to another campaign on another device. Detach it there first.
campaignHub.attachFailed: Couldn’t attach the character. Check your connection and try again.
campaignHub.chronicleHint: The shared story so far. Markdown welcome: # Chapter, ## Section, ### Scene, --- for a break, - for a list, **bold**.
campaignHub.chronicleShared: Shared with the whole party: saving updates the chronicle for everyone at the table.
campaignHub.chroniclePlaceholder:
# Session 1
The party descended into the Starless Keep…
campaignHub.chronicleEmpty: No chronicle yet. Record what befell the party; everyone at the table can add to the story.
campaignHub.chronicleWipeTitle: Remove this much of the story?
campaignHub.chronicleWipeMessage: You're about to delete a large part of the chronicle for the whole party. The previous version is kept in history, so you can restore it.
campaignHub.chronicleSaveFailed: Couldn't save the chronicle. You may be offline; try again once you're back online.
campaignHub.chronicleRestoreVersion: Load this version into the editor, then Save to apply
campaignHub.sessionsEmpty: No sessions logged yet. Start one when you sit down to play.
campaignHub.treasuryEmpty: No transactions yet. Add or take coins to start the party ledger.
campaignHub.notesEmpty: No shared notes yet. Add lore, leads, or reminders for the party.
campaignHub.notesError: Couldn’t load the shared notes. Check your connection and try again.
campaignHub.removeNoteMessage: This deletes the note for everyone in the campaign. It can’t be undone.
campaignHub.undoAddMessage: This deletes the entry for everyone and takes {{amount}} {{coin}} back out of the treasury.
campaignHub.undoTakeMessage: This deletes the entry for everyone and returns {{amount}} {{coin}} to the treasury.
campaignHub.deleteSessionMessage: This removes the session log for everyone in the campaign. It can’t be undone.
campaignHub.sessionNotesPlaceholder: What happened this session? What did the party find, and where did they leave off?
campaignHub.yieldDmHint: Promote another member to Dungeon Master. They can hand it back.
campaignHub.yieldDmMessage: {{name}} becomes the Dungeon Master and you become a player. The DM can hand it back.
campaignHub.yieldDmError: Couldn’t hand over the DM role. Check your connection and try again.
campaignHub.removeMemberHint: Remove a player from the campaign. Their character is detached; they can rejoin with the invite link unless joins are locked.
campaignHub.removeMemberMessage: {{name}} is removed from the campaign and their character is detached. They can rejoin with the invite link unless joins are locked.
campaignHub.removeMemberError: Couldn’t remove the member. Check your connection and try again.
campaignHub.lockJoinsHint: Turn this on to stop the invite link from admitting anyone new, shutting out a leaked link without changing the code. Current members stay; turn it off to let players join again.
campaignHub.joinsLockedToast: New joins locked: the invite link is disabled
campaignHub.joinsOpenedToast: New joins re-opened: the invite link works again
campaignHub.deleteCampaignHint: Deleting removes the campaign and its history for every member.
campaignHub.deleteCampaignMessage: This permanently deletes the campaign and all its sessions and chronicle for every member. It can’t be undone.
campaignHub.encounterBeginTurnsLockedHint: Every combatant must roll initiative before turns can begin.
campaignHub.encounterReorderHint: Drag, or use the arrow keys, to change the turn order.
campaignHub.encounterGatheringHint: The DM begins turns when everyone has rolled.
campaignHub.encounterEndMessage: This clears the tracker for the whole party. Initiative and current HP are not kept.
campaignHub.encounterEmpty: No combatants yet. The party is seeded automatically; add monsters to begin.
campaignHub.encounterMonsterNotesPlaceholder: Tactics, legendary resistances, spell list, motivations...
campaignHub.combatWriteFailed: This change couldn't be saved (it was rejected). Reload the app and try again; if it keeps happening, send a report from the menu.
campaignHub.turnAdvanceFailed: Couldn't advance the turn. Try again in a moment.
